channel.title: Lean on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Lean on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: Lean or Agile? Why choose when you can have it all? The power of applying Agile with a Lean mindset
item.description:
Interesting article. I have the book queued up for perusal. If you have a subscription to Safari Books you can read it too!

Lean or Agile? Why choose when you can have it all? The power of applying Agile with a Lean mindsetPlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.
